fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Hold Space for 2 s to record; release to transcribe and insert text.

fields.label: STT model
fields.description: Speech-to-text model id (e.g. whisper-1, gpt-4o-transcribe, whisper-large-v3).

fields.label: STT provider
fields.description: Provider for the STT model (openai, groq, google, sarvam).

fields.label: Hold duration (ms)
fields.description: How long (in milliseconds) to hold Space before recording starts. 500 = 0.5 s.

fields.label: Sample rate (Hz)
fields.description: Microphone sample rate. 16000 works with Whisper; 44100 for higher quality.
